name: AI Inventory Recorded
description: AI systems producing decisions or outputs are recorded in the firm's AI inventory.
rationale: IOSCO §3.1(d) / Table 6.1: firms maintain an AI inventory capturing each system's purpose, scope, data and model usage, and dependencies. A flag (Amber) where inventory coverage is incomplete.

examples.fails: an AI output from a system absent from the AI inventory

source: IOSCO FR/02/2026 — Supervisory Toolkit for AI Use in Capital Markets (May 2026), Ch.3 Tables 5 (Disclosure) and 6 (Recordkeeping & reporting).
